cart.title: ඔබේ සාප්පු භාණ්ඩ
cart.empty: සාප්පු භාණ්ඩය හිස්. නිෂ්පාදන හෝ සියලු කේක් වලින් එකතු කරන්න.

hero.title: සෑම ආහාරයක්ම මතකයක් කරමු
hero.subtitle: ශ්‍රී ලාංකික බේකරි සම්ප්‍රදායන්ට අනුකූලව, උසස් ගුණාත්මක අමුද්‍රව්‍ය සමඟ සෑම උදෑසනකම ආදරයෙන් සකස් කරයි.

sections.products_subtitle: දිනපතා නැවුම්ව බේක් කරන ලද, පාරිභෝගිකයින් ආදරයෙන් තෝරාගන්නා රසවත් නිෂ්පාදන.
sections.legacy_intro1: 2015 සිට Peoples Bakers අසල්වැසි බේකරි එකක සිට ශ්‍රී ලංකාව පුරා විශ්වාසදායක නාමයක් දක්වා වර්ධනය වී ඇත.
sections.legacy_intro2: නැවුම් රොටි සහ බනිස් සිට සැමරුම් කේක් දක්වා, සම්ප්‍රදායික ශිල්ප කුසලතාව නවීන රසය සමඟ එක් කර, සෑම ආහාරයක්ම අමතක නොවන අත්දැකීමක් බවට පත් කරයි.
sections.cakes_subtitle: උපන් දින, මංගලෝත්සව, හෝ සරල රස විඳීමක් — සම්පූර්ණ කේක් කැටලුව බලන්න.
sections.events_subtitle: අපගේ seasonal specials, tasting events සහ පවුල් සැමරුම් සඳහා අප සමඟ එක්වන්න.
sections.findus_subtitle: අපේ බේකරියට පැමිණ අපේ රසය අත්විඳින්න.

footer.about: වසර ගණනාවක් තිස්සේ Peoples Bakers දිවයින පුරා පවුල් වලට classic Sri Lankan bakery excellence ගෙන එයි — fresh bread, savouries, celebration cakes සහ photo cakes, හැම දිනකම care එක්ක bake.

home.why_h2: සෑම උදෑසනකම fresh, සෑම දිනකම විශ්වාසය
home.why_lead: ගුණාත්මක අමුද්‍රව්‍ය, අවංක බේකිං, දිව තුළ outlet — ඔබේ favourite treat එක දුර නැත.
home.why_c1p: සෑම loaf, bun සහ cake එකක්ම උදෑසන oven එකෙන්.
home.why_c2p: විශ්වාස කළ හැකි local & imported ingredients.
home.why_c3p: Peoples Bakers goodness ඔබේ නිවසට ළඟ.
home.why_c4p: අපේ passionate bakers සාදන traditional recipes.
home.out_sub: ඔබ ළඟ fresh Peoples Bakers — හැම දිනකම early open.
home.cat_sub: උදෑසන buns සිට celebration cakes දක්වා handcrafted delights.
home.show_lede: උණුසුම් interiors, handcrafted treats, celebration cakes — හැම උදෑසනකම care එක්ක bake.
home.test_sub: Peoples Bakers trust කරන families වල real stories.
home.test_q1: "Peoples Bakers cream bun එක best. හැම උදෑසනකම fresh — අපේ family routine එක."
home.test_q2: "Custom birthday cake එක order කළා — taste, texture, design හැම දෙයක් perfect."
home.test_q3: "Muffins සහ eclairs proper bakery treats වගේ. Mass-made stuff වලට වඩා quality feel වෙනවා."
home.news_h2: Peoples Bakers family එකට join වන්න
home.news_sub: Exclusive offers, new products, seasonal treats — inbox එකට straight.
home.teaser_h2: ඔබ ළඟ Peoples Bakers outlet එකක්
home.teaser_sub: City search, outlet type filter, location use — Google Maps directions one tap.

cakes.hero_p: උපන්දින සිට මංගල ශක්තිය දක්වා — ඔබේ මොහොත සුන්දර කිරීමට සෑම කේක් එකක්ම විශේෂය.
cakes.sub: උපන්දින, මුද්‍රිත, හෝ ගාටු වශයෙන් පෙරහන — ඔබේ සමරුවට සුදුසු කේක් සොයන්න.
cakes.cat_shop_sub: උපන්දින, මුද්‍රිත, හෝ ගාටු — ලොකු කාඩ් එකක් හෝ පහළ තිරුව තෝරන්න.
cakes.shapes_sub: එකක් තෝරා ඒ වර්ගයේ කේක් පමණක් පෙන්වෙනවා — එක එබුමින්.
cakes.group_gateau_sub: අස්තර වූ ගාටු, කෑම කොටසු — බෙදාහදාගන්න පහසුය.
cakes.group_printed_sub: නමේ “Printed” ඇති ඒවා — උපන්දින, ළමා තේමා සඳහා ඡායාරූප මුද්‍රණය.
cakes.group_celebration_sub: පාටි, තේමා, සමරු — උපන්දින සහ එකතුවීම්වලට සුදුසු උත්සව කේක්.
cakes.catalog_count: අමුතු “සියලු කේක්” පිටුවේ තිබුණා වගේම කේක් {{count}} ක් මෙතන පෙනෙනවා — “නිෂ්පාදන (Products)” එක ඇතුළේ එකතු කරලා තියෙනවා.
cakes.custom_p: ඕනෑම නිර්මාණයක්, රසයක්, ප්‍රමාණයක් — අපේ බේකරු ඔබේ අදහස ජීවයට නගති.
cakes.li4: අවම වශයෙන් පැය 48 ඉන් පෙරදී දැනුම්දෙන්න
cakes.ph_msg: රස, ප්‍රමාණය, තේමා, වර්ණ, විශේෂ ඉල්ලීම්...
cakes.err_load: කේක් ලැයිස්තුව නොආවා. products.html#cakes විවෘත කර යලි පූරණය කරන්න.

products_page.sub: Breads, cakes, savouries, and more — crafted with quality ingredients and served with pride.
products_page.sub2: Filter by category or browse everything we offer at Peoples Bakers.
products_page.note: Prices may vary by outlet. Use Order Online or visit Find Us for the branch nearest you.

legacy.hero_p: Turning meals into memories — one fresh loaf at a time.
legacy.ab_h2: Unfolding Our History, One Bake at a Time
legacy.p1: In 2015—with more determination than capital, and a simple promise to earn an honest living through quality bakes—our founder pulled the very first loaf from a modest kitchen in Bulathsinhala. Through every barrier, he served the neighbourhood with warmth and consistency.
legacy.p2: As word spread through the community — not through advertising, but through honest taste and genuine care — the little bakery began to grow. New products joined the shelves: cream buns, seeni sambol rolls, celebration cakes, and seasonal treats that became household favourites across generations.
legacy.p3: Penetrating all barriers which stood before them, Peoples Bakers kept expanding while maintaining the impeccable essence of their products. New outlets opened in Nugegoda, Kandy, Galle, and beyond. The bakery that started before dawn at a single counter had become a trusted name across Sri Lanka — loved for its consistency, its quality, and its heart.
legacy.p4: Today, with 150+ outlets island-wide, an online ordering platform, and partnerships with Uber Eats and PickMe Food, Peoples Bakers continues to grow — while holding firmly to the belief that every bake must carry the same love as the very first loaf.
legacy.grow_h2: Dedicated in serving passion to those who chase behind flavours
legacy.grow_sub: A team of skilful hands putting individual commitment into one shared goal — delivering the finest bakes, every single day.
legacy.vis_quote: පාරිභෝගික අවශ්‍යතා සපුරාලීම සඳහා උසස් තත්ත්වයේ බේකරි ආහාර නිෂ්පාදනය, බෙදාහැරීම සහ අලෙවිකරණය කිරීම මඟින් ක්‍ෂේත්‍රයේ ප්‍රමුඛයා බවට පත්වීම.
legacy.team_h2: Forefrontiers who drive our mission forward
legacy.team_sub: The leadership behind every loaf, every outlet, and every smile.
legacy.t1_bio: From the first loaf in Bulathsinhala to 150+ outlets — guiding Peoples Bakers with vision, quality, and heart.
legacy.t2_bio: Ensuring smooth daily operations across outlets, supply, and customer experience.
legacy.t3_bio: Leading strategy, outlet performance, and the teams that keep every branch running.
legacy.t4_bio: Overseeing ovens, recipes, and production units that bake fresh every morning.
legacy.t5_bio: Maintaining standards, hygiene, and consistency in every product we serve.
legacy.t6_bio: Building partnerships, community relations, and the Peoples Bakers brand story.
legacy.csr_sub: We believe a great bakery gives back to the community it serves.
legacy.csr_e1p: We are on a mission to reduce waste across all production units, source sustainably, and minimise our environmental footprint by 2027.
legacy.csr_e2p: Our community initiative focuses on education, healthcare, and social welfare — empowering the neighbourhoods that built us.
legacy.csr_e3p: We partner with local farmers and suppliers to ensure fresh, natural ingredients while supporting Sri Lanka's agricultural economy.
legacy.part_p: Reach out and find how we can help your business grow with Peoples Bakers. We would love to discuss partnership and franchise opportunities with you.
legacy.vis_text: පාරිභෝගික අවශ්‍යතා සපුරාලීම සඳහා උසස් තත්ත්වයේ බේකරි ආහාර නිෂ්පාදනය, බෙදාහැරීම සහ අලෙවිකරණය කිරීම මඟින් ක්‍ෂේත්‍රයේ ප්‍රමුඛයා බවට පත්වීම.
legacy.mis_text: නැවුම්, සෞඛ්‍ය සම්පන්න, ඉහළ සම්මත ගුණාත්මකභාවයේ නිෂ්පාදන අඩු නිෂ්පාදන වියදමකින් සහ අවම wastage සමඟ ලබා දීමේ කාර්යකාරී ක්‍රමවේදයක් හරහා, ඉහළ පාරිභෝගික සෑහීමක් ලබා ගනිමින් සහ සියලුම ව්‍යාපාරික සහකරුවන් සමඟ ශක්තිමත් සබඳතා ගොඩනගමින්, ව්‍යාපාර අංශයේ සාර්ථකත්වය ළඟා කිරීම.
legacy.history_caption: බුලත්සිංහලේ සරල kitchen එකක සිට ශ්‍රී ලංකාව පුරා විශ්වාස නාමයක් දක්වා.

i24.d: Deep cocoa muffin with melted chocolate centre.

i25.d: Soft banana muffin — perfect with morning tea.

i26.d: Classic buttery vanilla muffin, baked fresh daily.

i27.d: Pink berry muffin with real strawberry chunks.

i28.d: Chocolate-glazed donut finished with rainbow sprinkles.

i29.d: Pink-glazed ring donut with a sweet berry finish.

i30.d: Choux pastry filled with cream, topped with chocolate.

i31.d: Classic eclair with vanilla cream and chocolate drizzle.

i32.d: Crispy layered wafers with rich chocolate cream.

hero.st_morn: Open now · morning orders delivering in ~30 min
hero.st_closed: We're closed · WhatsApp us for tomorrow's pre-order
hero.eyebrow: The new Peoples Bakers ordering experience
hero.lede: WhatsApp, delivery apps, direct line, walk in — oven-fresh quality 2015 සිට trust.

studio.h2: Build your order in three steps
studio.sub: No login, no hassle. We'll package everything into a ready-to-send WhatsApp message so our team can confirm fast.
studio.s1p: Pick one or more — we'll tailor the next step.
studio.tip: Tip: you can still add custom items on step 2.
studio.s2p: Tell us what you'd like and when — prices confirmed at checkout with our team.
studio.f_items_ph: e.g. 1× 1kg Chocolate Gateau with 'Happy Birthday Nimal' message, 10× butter buns, 6× fish patties...
studio.s3p: We'll contact you to confirm pricing & timing.
studio.notes: Any notes? (allergies, decoration, message on cake)
studio.promo: Apply CAKE20 for 20% off cakes where eligible.
studio.rev_empty: Fill in the steps above and your summary will appear here.

msg.open: Hi Peoples Bakers, I'd like to place an order.
msg.name: • Name: {{v}}

zone.p: Area එක type කරන්න — delivery window සහ channels කියනවා.
zone.miss: Area එක හොයගත නැහැ. Nearby town try කරන්න, හෝ WhatsApp.

steps.sub: Simple on the outside, fresh on the inside.
steps.s1p: Quick order studio, WhatsApp, delivery apps, phone, or visit.
steps.s2p: Our team confirms price, timing, and baking starts the moment it's locked.
steps.s3p: Delivery, pickup, or dine-in — the taste is exactly as if you walked into the outlet.

channels.sub: Same brand, same standards — across every touchpoint.
channels.call_p: Ideal for celebration cakes, bulk and corporate orders, outlet questions, and personalised requests. A real person answers.
channels.wa_p: Chat with us, share photos/references, and get quick pricing. Best for custom cakes.
channels.ue_p: Search Peoples Bakers on Uber Eats for delivery where the service is available.
channels.pm_p: Order via PickMe Food for convenient same-day delivery in supported areas.
channels.v_p: 150+ locations — step in for the full counter experience and daily specials.

occ.sub: Pre-order early so our bakers can give your moment the attention it deserves.
occ.b1p: Custom names, photos, themes — starting from Rs. 1,500.
occ.w1p: Tiered designs, elegant finishes — custom consultations available.
occ.c1p: Branded cakes, office trays, bulk short eats, and event catering.
occ.k1p: Bento cakes, cupcakes, party packs — fun flavours, playful designs.

pay.sub: Cash on delivery, cards, digital wallets — whatever is easiest for you.

track.h2: From oven to doorstep — in clear view
track.p: Once your order is confirmed, we'll text you a tracking link. Here's what the journey looks like.
track.t1s: We've got it and priced it.
track.demo_note: Nimal is preparing your order at our Nugegoda outlet.

love.sub: Real messages from real customers across the island.
love.s1: "Ordered a chocolate gateau at 9am, delivered by lunch. Soft, fresh, beautifully packed. Not a cream smudge."
love.s2: "Their WhatsApp team replied in 2 minutes with a photo of the cake design. Felt like a concierge, not a bakery."
love.s3: "Monthly office coffee & short-eats order never misses. Invoicing is easy and the patties are perfect."

show.p: From morning buns to tiered wedding cakes — explore everything we bake, then order through the channel you love.

faq.a1: City orders confirmed වුණාම 30–60 min. Cakes 4–24 hours, custom cakes 48+ hours.
faq.a2: 150+ outlets. Uber/PickMe/riders coverage outlet අනුව. Delivery check try කරන්න.
faq.a3: Cash on delivery, card, LankaQR, Genie, eZ Cash, bank transfer. Remote orders WhatsApp card link.
faq.a4: ඔව් — eggless options බොහෝ cakes. Gluten-free advance notice. WhatsApp ask කර confirm.
faq.a5: ඔව් — offices, events, weddings bulk short eats, coffee, multi-tier cakes. Invoice properly.
faq.a6: Standard items delivery 1 hour before change. Baked custom cakes cancel නැත; decoration adjust until bake.

order.offer: 20% off all cakes — use code CAKE20 when you order.

page.builder_sub: ඔබට සුදුසු method එක pick කරන්න — items, price, timing minutes ඇතුළත confirm.
page.aside_p: Custom, bulk, urgent? Chat/call — real person instant sort.
page.checkout_sub: Delivery/pickup, location set, confirm — Uber/PickMe වගේ, direct Peoples Bakers.
page.success_p: Order එක in. Team confirm කරනවා.
page.pay_payhere: Pay online — PayHere (Visa, Mastercard, LankaQR, Genie…)
page.basket_note: Prices indicative; final amount team confirm.

account.hero_sub: Orders, profile සහ checkout details එක තැනක.
account.profile_sub: Next order fast checkout සඳහා save.
account.discount_hint: Valid mobile add කර checkout discounts unlock කරන්න.
account.tip_phone: Phone update — delivery updates සහ WhatsApp confirmations.
account.server_error: Server reach වෙන්න බැරි. npm start කර http://localhost:3000 open කරන්න.
account.discount_title_save: Phone add කර order එකකින් save වෙන්න
account.cancel_confirm: Order cancel කරන්නද? Online paid නම් refund process කරනවා.
account.load_orders_fail: Orders load වුණේ නැත. Refresh කර try again.
account.server_outdated: Server outdated. npm start කර http://localhost:3000 open කර Ctrl+Shift+R.
